PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('SINGLE')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiElement(,)(',')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHeredocExpressionImpl(HEREDOC_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(HERDOC@)('@')
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiElement(HEREDOC_END_TAG)('DOUBLE')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiComment(HEREDOC_ENDING)('SINGLE')
